description: Initial screen showing instructions to share the window.

description: First block of task instructions is revealed on screen.

description: Final block of task instructions is revealed on screen.

description: A task completion overlay appears with instructions to close the website task.

description: The screen recording ends and the video switches to the participant's webcam view.
frame_description: The mobile app interface is replaced by a full-screen video of the participant sitting in a room.
